TITLE: The Last Lamp

INT. RAILWAY WAITING ROOM - NIGHT

Rain hits the windows. A single lamp flickers above a locked departure door.

MARA: The last train left twenty years ago.

ELIAS enters carrying a sealed red suitcase.

ELIAS: Then why does the timetable still change every midnight?

MARA keeps the departure key hidden in her glove. She believes Elias caused the old station fire, but she has never seen proof.

The station clock strikes twelve. The timetable flips by itself and displays MARA'S NAME.

ELIAS: I came to return this. Your father pulled me out of the fire. The suitcase was his.

MARA opens the suitcase. Inside is her father's conductor badge and a letter proving the fire was an accident.

The departure door unlocks. Mara may leave, or remain to keep the lamp lit for the next lost passenger.
